heading: Purpose
label: 3201 Purpose
text: It is the purpose of this chapter (1) to provide educational assistance to those men and women who enter the Armed Forces after , and before , (2) to assist young men and women in obtaining an education they might not otherwise be able to afford, and (3) to promote and assist the all volunteer military program of the United States by attracting qualified men and women to serve in the Armed Forces.December 31, 1976July 1, 1985
notes: Prior ProvisionsPrior section 3201 was renumbered .section 5501 of this title
Amendments1991— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–83section 1601 of this title1986— inserted “and before ,”.Pub. L. 99–576July 1, 1985

Effective Dateprovided that:Section 406 of title IV of Pub. L. 94–502“The provisions of this title [enacting this chapter, amending sections 1652, 1661, and 1662 [now 3452, 3461, and 3462] of this title and section 725s of former Title 31, Money and Finance, and enacting provisions set out as a note under ] shall become effective on .”section 3221 of this titleJanuary 1, 1977
Short TitleFor short titles of , and title IV of , which enacted this chapter, see Short Title of 1976 Amendments note set out under .Pub. L. 94–502Pub. L. 94–502section 101 of this title

Enrollment in Program BeforeApril 1, 1987, (d), , , provided that:Pub. L. 99–576, title III, § 309(c)100 Stat. 3270Oct. 28, 1986“(c).—ExceptionNotwithstanding the amendments made by subsection (a) [amending this section and sections 1602 and 1621 [now 3202 and 3221] of this title], any individual on active duty in the Armed Forces who was eligible on , to enroll in the program established by chapter 32 of title 38, United States Code, may enroll, before , in such program.June 30, 1985April 1, 1987“(d).—Notice RequirementThe Secretary of Defense, and the Secretary of Transportation with respect to the Coast Guard when it is not operating as a service in the Navy, shall carry out activities for the purpose of notifying, to the maximum extent feasible, individuals described in subsection (c) of the opportunity provided by such subsection.”
